response.original_title: The Guy Who Didn't Like Musicals (2025 Remount)
response.overview: Return to the terrifying town of Hatchetfield in this remounted production of the 2018 StarKid hit. Directed by Lauren Lopez, this new version of THE GUY WHO DIDN'T LIKE MUSICALS is filled with chills, thrills and show stoppin' numbers. Watch at your own peril!
response.title: The Guy Who Didn't Like Musicals (2025 Remount)
